model_comparison:
Both models performed exceptionally well, accurately reading the text with perfect fluency and successfully conveying the required 'enthusiastic' attitude. Both are deserving of the highest score.

However, a fine-grained distinction can be made in the delivery of the emotion. Model 1 provides a very natural and happy announcement, with a consistently cheerful tone throughout. Model 2, in contrast, delivers a more dynamic and explosive performance. Its enthusiasm builds more intensely and culminates in a more powerful, exclamatory delivery of "我升职了！" (1.7s-2.8s). This 'burst' of emotion in Model 2 feels slightly more impactful and representative of the sheer joy of receiving a promotion.

The difference is subtle, as both are excellent interpretations. But Model 2's more dramatic emotional contour gives it a slight edge in creating a more memorable and vivid expression of enthusiasm. Therefore, Model 2 is the winner.
